title: デビュー戦の後に・First Step

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her debut race over, Fine Motion is so
overcome with emotion that she's left speechless.
She also expresses a powerful desire to run in
more races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But what she needs right now is to train hard to
ensure she can endure more intense races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide to have her build up more experience
while I think about which race we should set as
her next objective. First of all, we need to get
real results and build her fanbase!
